pattern: Energy and experience are independent resources, so the minimum training is the energy shortfall plus the experience top-ups needed to stay strictly ahead before each fight.
hints: The two resources never trade off against each other, so solve the energy need and the experience need separately and add them.
Energy is spent cumulatively, so you must start with strictly more than the total of all opponents' energy.

Walk the opponents in order tracking current experience; whenever it is not strictly greater than the next opponent's, buy exactly enough hours to make it one more, then add that opponent's experience.

edge_inputs.description: needs both energy and experience training
exactly tied energy needs one more
tied experience must be broken before the fight
experience grows from defeated opponents reducing later needs

stress.description: random opponents stress separate energy and experience accounting
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, min(size, 100))
    ie = rng.randint(1, 100)
    ix = rng.randint(1, 100)
    energy = [rng.randint(1, 100) for _ in range(n)]
    experience = [rng.randint(1, 100) for _ in range(n)]
    return [ie, ix, energy, experience]
